scenarios.description: parse(File, charsetName) uses explicit charsetName and file absolute path as baseUri
scenarios.precondition: temp file exists with simple HTML content
scenarios.expectedResult: Document body HTML matches file content and baseUri equals file absolute path
pseudocode: TEST TC11 parse file with explicit charset

scenarios.description: parse(File, charsetName, baseUri, parser) forwards to DataUtil.load with custom parser
scenarios.expectedResult: XML parser used: self-closing tag recognized, baseUri honored
pseudocode: TEST TC12 parse file with parser override
Document doc = Jsoup.parse(file, charset, baseUri, xml);

scenarios.description: parse(Path, charsetName) reads path with explicit charset and uses path absolute as baseUri
scenarios.precondition: temp Path exists with simple HTML content
scenarios.expectedResult: Document body HTML matches content and baseUri equals path.abs
pseudocode: TEST TC13 parse path with explicit charset

scenarios.description: parse(Path) auto-detect charsetName null and path absolute baseUri
scenarios.precondition: temp Path exists with simple HTML content, no BOM/meta required
scenarios.expectedResult: Document body HTML matches content and baseUri equals path.abs
pseudocode: TEST TC14 parse path with auto charset

scenarios.description: parse(Path, charsetName, baseUri, parser) uses custom parser on Path input
scenarios.expectedResult: XML parser used: self-closing tag recognized and baseUri honored
pseudocode: TEST TC15 parse path with parser override
Document doc = Jsoup.parse(path, charset, baseUri, xml);

scenarios.description: parse(InputStream, charsetName, baseUri, parser) closes stream and uses provided parser
scenarios.precondition: RecordingInputStream over simple XML fragment, xmlParser chosen
scenarios.expectedResult: stream closed, XML parser used, baseUri honored
pseudocode: TEST TC16 parse stream with parser override
Document doc = Jsoup.parse(in, charset, baseUri, xml);

scenarios.description: parse(File, charsetName) throws IOException on invalid charsetName
scenarios.expectedResult: IOException is thrown due to unsupported charsetName
pseudocode: TEST TC17 parse file invalid charset
